settings.heading: Where is it made?
settings.content: Using Nano-Crystalline technology, Bleame™ Crystal Hair Eraser allows the hair to clump and break from the surface when rubbed gently on the skin. This process also helps exfoliate, revealing baby smooth skin after use 💜

settings.heading: Instructions
settings.content:
Prep Your Skin

Exfoliate your skin no less than 24 hours before use. If you have sensitive skin, exfoliate no less than 48 hours before use.

Patch Test for Sensitivity

Conduct a patch test on a small area of each leg: one with damp skin and the other with dry skin. Test with moisture barriers like hypoallergenic moisturizer or cream. Allow it to fully absorb before using your Eraser. For added comfort, test with a protective layer of shaving gel or cream.

Get to action

After a successful patch test, treat your desired areas using the method and technique that felt most comfortable during testing. Start with gentle, circular motions and light pressure. Adjust your technique as needed, avoiding excessive pressure that may cause irritation. Take breaks between passes and use shorter strokes to minimize friction and heat.

Aftercare for Soothing Relief

Rinse the treated area with cool water and gently pat it dry, avoiding rubbing. Apply a fragrance-free, hypoallergenic moisturizer. For an extra relief, use a cold compress for 10-15 minutes.

Caring for Your Eraser

After each use, rinse your Crystal Hair Eraser under running water to remove hair and exfoliated skin. Store the eraser in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight and humidity.
Important Note: If you experience any discomfort or irritation during or after use, discontinue use immediately. Visit our Help Center for more information.

settings.heading: How It Works?
settings.content:
PREGGO by O Positiv supports male fertility by delivering a targeted blend of science-backed nutrients that improve overall sperm health. Ingredients like Tongkat Ali help support testosterone levels, while N-Acetyl Cysteine (NAC) and Alpha Lipoic Acid (ALA) work as antioxidants to protect sperm from oxidative stress.

This combination promotes sperm count, motility, morphology, and overall reproductive wellness—making it easier to support conception naturally over time with daily use.

settings.heading: Who Is It For?
settings.content:
PREGGO Sperm Health Support Capsules are ideal for men looking to enhance their fertility naturally. Whether you're beginning your journey to conception or aiming to improve overall reproductive wellness, PREGGO supports sperm count, motility, and morphology using clinically researched ingredients.

Perfect for anyone seeking a thoughtful, expert-formulated supplement to help boost vitality and support reproductive health without side effects. Let me know if you’d like a version tailored to a specific audience!

settings.heading: Return & Refund Policy
settings.content:
1.1 Return Due To Change Of Mind

Evoq will happily accept returns due to change of mind as long as a request to return is received by us within 72 hours of receipt of item. 

Once approved, refunds will be processed to their original payment method. We will notify you once this has been completed through email.

Evoq will refund the value of the goods returned but will NOT refund the value of any shipping paid.

1.2 Cancellations

If you change your mind before a tracking numbers has been generated, we are able to accept cancellations at any time before the order has been dispatched. If an order has already been dispatched, please refer to our refund policy.

settings.heading: Look At How Others Are Loving Their Bleame
settings.text: These women are actual Bleame customers that have seen results with consistent use of Bleame's Gua Sha Facial Set!

Dopamine is a neurotransmitter known as the “motivation molecule.” It controls the reward system in your brain, keeping you mentally driven. This primary neurotransmitter is created through precursors that kickstart the production process, like an amino acid called l-tyrosine. Then, multiple cofactor nutrients support that process along the way.

settings.text: Dopamine Brain Food™ is the only formula that supplies all these crucial precursors and cofactors to support dopamine production.* The result? settings.faq-ques: What is Dopamine Brain Food™ used for?
settings.faq-content: It’s designed to support natural dopamine production, which plays a key role in motivation, focus, mental drive, and emotional balance.

settings.faq-ques: How long does it take to feel the effects?
settings.faq-content: Most users report feeling a difference within a few days to a week of consistent use. However, some may notice effects sooner, even after the first dose.

settings.faq-ques: Can I take it every day?
settings.faq-content: Yes, it's safe for daily use. The recommended dose is 3 capsules daily in the morning, with or without food. Do not exceed 6 capsules in a day.

settings.faq-ques: Will this supplement boost dopamine instantly like medication?
settings.faq-content: No. It naturally supports your body's dopamine production over time. It’s not a stimulant or synthetic dopamine source.

settings.faq-ques: Is it safe to take with antidepressants or ADHD meds?
settings.faq-content: You should consult your healthcare provider before combining it with any medications, especially those affecting brain chemistry or mood.
